hero.title: Automate Facebook Comment Moderation with AI

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in minutes with our simple three-step process

step1.title: Connect Your Page

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AI Comment Replyer
faq.q1: How does AI comment reply work?
faq.a1: Our AI analyzes incoming comments and generates contextual, brand-aligned responses in seconds. You can customize tone, style, and approve responses before they go live.
faq.a2: Currently, we support Facebook Pages and Instagram. We're continuously expanding to other social media platforms based on user demand.
faq.a3: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade encryption, comply with GDPR standards, and never share your data with third parties. Your account and comments are fully protected.
faq.q4: Can I customize the AI responses?
faq.a4: Yes! You can set custom rules, tone preferences, response templates, and approval workflows. The AI learns from your brand voice and improves over time.
faq.q5: What happens if the AI makes a mistake?
faq.a5: All responses can be set to require manual approval before posting. You can also edit, reject, or provide feedback on any generated response to help the AI learn.

finalCta.title: Ready to Get Started?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses automating their comment management. Start your free 14-day trial today.

footer.description: Automate your social media responses with AI that understands your brand.

hero.eyebrow: Stop losing customers in your comments
hero.title: Pick a plan, save hours every week
hero.subtitle: Every plan handles comments 24/7 across Facebook, Instagram & TikTok. Upgrade as you grow.

banner.title: Replace 10+ hours/week of comment moderation
banner.body: AI replies in your tone, hides spam, escalates real questions. Your team focuses on customers — not refreshing notifications.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before choosing a plan.
faq.q1: What happens if I exceed my limit?
faq.a1: On Free, after 50 comments your account automatically upgrades to Pro ($49/mo) using the card you saved — so your automation never pauses. We email you before the charge. On Pro/Business, you can upgrade in one click.
faq.a2: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade anytime from your billing page. Changes apply immediately and we prorate the difference.
faq.a3: One AI-handled comment = one incoming comment that the AI analyzes and acts on (reply, hide, escalate). Comments you ignore manually do not count.
faq.a4: You can cancel anytime and keep access until the end of your billing period. We don't do partial refunds, but the Free plan lets you fully test before paying.

status.title: System Status
status.modeFullAutoDesc: All pages have auto-reply and auto-moderation enabled.
status.modeLimitedDesc: Some automation features are disabled on one or more pages.
status.modeManualDesc: All automation is disabled. Comments require manual action.
status.modeNoPagesDesc: No pages connected. Connect a page to get started.

status.noApiErrors: No API errors in the last 24 hours.
status.noAiErrors: No AI errors in the last 24 hours.

info.totalUsers: Total number of registered users on the platform, excluding admin accounts.
info.totalPages: Total active connected pages across all platforms. Disconnected pages are not counted.
info.activeUsers: Users who logged in within the last 7 days. Indicates platform engagement.
info.totalComments: Total number of comments fetched from all connected pages (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok Organic, TikTok Ads) across all users.
info.userGrowth: Cumulative total users (blue) and new registrations per day (green) over the last 30 days.
info.commentsActivity: Number of new comments received per day across all connected pages of all users.
info.platformSplit: Distribution of connected pages across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok Organic and TikTok Ads. Shows which platform users prefer.
info.userStatus: Ratio of users who have connected at least one page (active) vs users who have not connected any page yet (inactive).
info.newUsersWeek: Users who registered in the last 7 days.
info.newUsersMonth: Users who registered in the last 30 days.
info.usersWithoutPages: Users who signed up but have not connected any page yet (Facebook, Instagram, or TikTok). These are inactive users.
info.avgPagesPerUser: Total connected pages divided by total users (including users without any connected pages). A higher number indicates deeper platform adoption.
info.recentRegistrations: The 5 most recently registered users. Click any row to view their full profile.
